stem:
f(x) = (x − 7)(x + 3)

If the given function f is graphed in the xy-plane, where y = f(x), what is the x-coordinate of an x-intercept of the graph?
rationale: The x-intercepts occur where f(x) = 0. Setting (x − 7)(x + 3) = 0 yields x = 7 or x = −3. Either value is a valid answer; 7 (or −3) is acceptable.
